changes: Check release notes at download page for details

known_issues: Resizable BAR disabled by default (enable for GPU workloads)

model_variant_info.prefix_meaning: PIO = Plug-In Module (component for multi-node chassis)
model_variant_info.suffix_meaning: -NODE = Individual compute node module within multi-node chassis
deployment_notes: Designed to plug into multi-node shared chassis infrastructure
Shares power supplies, cooling, and management with other nodes
Enables higher density deployments compared to standalone servers
Typically used in large-scale data center deployments
Common in provider environments like Ori Industries

related_variants.difference: Standalone 8U server with integrated chassis, power, and cooling (AS = A+ Server)
Standalone variant with custom configuration (OI021 likely = Ori Industries order code)

comparison_table.deployment: Plug-in node in multi-node chassis (shared infrastructure)

research_notes.doc_discovery_method: Web search for 'Supermicro PIO plug-in multi-node' + Redfish system info query
notes: PIO prefix indicates plug-in module for multi-node chassis (confirmed via web research)
Model number breakdown: 8=8U, 1=drive type, 2=dual socket, 5=5th gen AMD EPYC 9004, GS=GPU platform
Documentation may be under generic 8125GS family pages
Multi-node systems reduce data center footprint and power consumption
Used by cloud providers like Ori Industries for high-density GPU deployments
Enable Above4GDecoding for addressing GPUs beyond 4GB
Enable Re_SizeBARSupport (Resizable BAR) for modern GPUs (RTX 30xx+, AMD 6000+)
Enable PCIe ARI for proper device enumeration with many GPUs
Consider enabling IOMMU for GPU passthrough/virtualization
System supports 8x GPUs with proper PCIe bifurcation

known_configurations.name: 8x H100 80GB
known_configurations.notes: Tested with 8x NVIDIA H100 80GB GPUs. Enable Resizable BAR.

known_configurations.name: 8x MI300X
known_configurations.notes: AMD MI300X support. Ensure latest BIOS and enable ARI.
